title: Snap To Surface Feature
description: Snaps the y-value of a feature placement position to the floor or the ceiling within the provided vertical search range.

snap_to_surface_feature_definition.title: Snap To Surface Feature Definition
snap_to_surface_feature_definition.description: A single Snap To Surface Feature Definition.

identifier.description: The identifier for this feature. The identifier must include a namespace and must match the filename.

feature_to_snap.description: Reference to the feature to snap.

vertical_search_range.description: Range to search for a floor or ceiling for snapping the feature.

surface.description: Optional. Defines the surface that the y-value of the placement position will be snapped to. Valid values: 'ceiling', 'floor', 'random_horizontal'. Defaults to 'floor'.

allow_air_placement.description: Optional. Determines whether the feature can snap through air blocks. Defaults to true.

allow_underwater_placement.description: Optional. Determines whether the feature can snap through water blocks. Defaults to false.

allowed_surface_blocks.description: Optional. A list of blocks that the feature is permitted to snap to. Leaving this empty results in the feature snapping to blocks that can provide support for the given face (up/down/horizontal).

embed_in_surface.description: Optional. Determines whether the placed feature should be embedded in the found surface.
